news.t: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
This commodities strategy can protect you from inflation, scarcity and even price declines
USCF INVESTMENTS ANNOUNCES GROWTH AND ACCOLADES FOR THE USCF SUMMERHAVEN DYNAMIC COMMODITY STRATEGY NO K-1 FUND (NYSE ARCA: SDCI)
USCF Announces Launch of the USCF Gold Strategy Plus Income Fund (Ticker: GLDX)

overview.description: The USCF SummerHaven Dynamic Commodity Strategy No K-1 Fund (SDCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund is a broad-market commodity fund that holds an equally weighted portfolio of 14 commodity futures contracts. Contracts are chosen for optimal backwardation and price momentum. SDCI was launched on May 3, 2018 and is issued by Marygold.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.

data.title: This commodities strategy can protect you from inflation, scarcity and even price declines
data.text: A dynamic commodities strategy can enhance an investment portfolio's returns over the long term.
